title: hieracium atratum subsp. subnigrescens
intro: Hieracium atratum subsp. subnigrescens, commonly known as the Black Hawk's Tear or Black Hawk's Tear Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as a treatment for fever and inflammation, as well as its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium atratum subsp. subnigrescens include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a tea or infused oil, and can be used externally to treat skin conditions or internally as a supplement to promote overall health.
